summary: Rewrote the two grimshot-based screenshot binds in config/config.kdl (Mod+Shift+S, Print) to the grim/slurp/satty form matching the working Mod+Shift+A bind, changed Mod+C from spawn "code" to spawn "codium", and added pkgs.playerctl to modules/home/packages/media-dictation.nix. Edits were re-anchored on bind content (not stale line numbers) since task 74 had just modified the autostart section of the same file. Headless verification (nix flake check, home-manager build --flake .#benjamin) both succeeded; closure inspection confirmed grim, slurp, satty, playerctl present, and codium confirmed present system-wide.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary with verification details for task 75
Mod+C spawn code->codium; Mod+Shift+S and Print screenshot binds rewritten from grimshot to grim/slurp/satty (matching Mod+Shift+A); task 74's autostart/wallpaper/polkit changes untouched
Added pkgs.playerctl to home.packages for MPRIS media-transport binds

next_action_hint: Task complete. Manual post-switch step for the user: after home-manager switch, exercise Mod+Shift+S (area screenshot), Print (full screenshot), Mod+Shift+A (regression check), XF86AudioPlay/Next/Prev (with an MPRIS player active), and Mod+C (VSCodium launch) in a live niri session.
